sourceMovie.title: Doctor Strange
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Doctor Strange (2016) as a fantasy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The fantasy and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Thor
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Doctor Strange clicked for you, Thor (2011) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Thor: The Dark World
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Doctor Strange clicked for you, Thor: The Dark World (2013) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Doctor Strange clicked for you, Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Castle in the Sky
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Doctor Strange clicked for you, Castle in the Sky (1986) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and adventure, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Doctor Strange clicked for you, The Avengers (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Doctor Strange?
faq.answer: Try Thor, Thor: The Dark World, Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings—each shares DNA with Doctor Strange while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Doctor Strange?
faq.answer: Doctor Strange (2016) is best described as Fantasy, Adventure, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Doctor Strange part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Doctor Strange Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
